title: Tomtenissar - Mischievous Elves
description: Adds "Tomtenissar" from Scandinavian folklore that help you. Just make sure to not upset them.
body:
This mod adds mischievous elves from Nordic folklore called **Tomtar**(or tomtenissar) that will help shear your sheep, milk your cows, and protect your base from monsters.

**But watch out!** You'll need to make sure you keep them happy or they'll start pranking you instead!


Feed them with good food(they wont accept it if it's low quality), or give them shinies like diamonds or emeralds, to keep them happy.

 

Credits

Jacqueline Vile - Original Concept, Artist

Ageuxo - Coding, Gameplay
